hot_cache.note: Always rm -rf __pycache__ before gateway restart. Gateway loads stale bytecode.

hot_cache.topic: Gateway tool dispatch injects internal kwargs (task_id, user_task, session_id)
hot_cache.note: Use signature introspection in _wrap(), not hardcoded blacklist.
Fixed: edit_mode='suggested', search_backend='wikipedia' in _derive_defaults. Config file (evol.json) overrides both.

hot_cache.topic: _safe_write returned void — auto-apply broken since v0.1.0
hot_cache.note: Fixed: returns True/False instead of implicit None.
Backup directory with its own plugin.yaml and register() hijacked every restart. Deleted.

gotchas.problem: Gateway loads stale bytecode after source edits
Hermes gateway injects task_id, user_task, session_id, actor_id into tool calls
gotchas.root_cause: Internal gateway dispatch adds kwargs before forwarding to registered tools
gotchas.fix: Use signature introspection in _wrap() to filter kwargs not in function signature

gotchas.problem: hermes-evol.bak directory with own plugin.yaml overwrites live plugin registration
gotchas.root_cause: Gateway plugin scanner loads all directories in plugins/, backup had its own register() with v0.1.0 code
gotchas.fix: Delete .bak directories immediately. Never create backups inside plugins/

gotchas.problem: _safe_write returned None (implicit) or None on pass — every auto-apply reported failed
gotchas.root_cause: Function was void, _apply_circuit_edit did `return _safe_write(...)` → always falsy
gotchas.fix: Return True on success, False on failure

gotchas.problem: OpenHands sandbox requires secrets.json for GitHub auth — provider tokens in settings.json are not passed to agent containers
gotchas.root_cause: Provider tokens stored in settings.json remain in the host environment; OpenHands sandbox containers only receive secrets from secrets.json
gotchas.fix: Register GitHub tokens in secrets.json rather than relying on provider tokens from settings.json

recent_changes.summary: Multi-gate heartbeat + idle-depth scaling + evol.jsonl as single source of truth + auto-apply fix + multi-backend search

files.hermes_evol/registry.py: All 5 phase implementations + LLM calling + promotion engine
files.hermes_evol/engine.py: EvolEngine bridge class + heartbeat thread + trigger gates
files.hermes_evol/plugin.py: Gateway entry point — register() + _wrap() for JSON-safe tools
files.hermes_evol/knowledge.py: Three-tier knowledge layer: wikilinks, decay, capacity management
